query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_vocus FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'Vocus' AND status != 'archived';
SELECT externalId, customerName, technology, locId, ipAddress, serviceActivationDate FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'Vocus' AND status != 'archived' ORDER BY customerName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_vocus FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'Vocus' AND status != 'archived';
SELECT externalId, customerName, technology, locId, ipAddress, serviceActivationDate FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'Vocus' AND status != 'archived' ORDER BY customerName;
